source.multipart_basis: Decomposition reflects a welded tubular + plate Hyperloop pod chassis. Separated bodies cover the main longitudinal beams, cross frames, bogie attachment plates, levitation suspension mounts, braking system mount, payload compartment and aeroshell attachment tabs described in the original brief. No rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Deliver the primary pod chassis of a Hyperloop Geliştirme Performance-track pod as a multi-body assembly rather than a single solid body. The pod runs inside a Hyperloop test tube at internal pressure 100 Pa absolute (near-vacuum), tube inner diameter 1.2 m, track length 125 m. Target top speed 100 km/h (27.8 m/s) on a straight run with minimum 2 g emergency deceleration. Pod total wet mass <= 150 kg. Chassis is a welded tubular + plate structure: AISI 4130 chromoly primary tubes (E 205 GPa, yield 460 MPa, UTS 560 MPa, rho 7850 kg/m^3) and 6061-T6 aluminum plate bulkheads. Chassis envelope 2.0 m (L) x 0.6 m (W) x 0.5 m (H) inside a 150 mm tube clearance margin. Four passive magnetic bogies at the four corners provide levitation; lateral guidance by rail-follower wheels. The chassis carries a battery pack (35 kg, 400 x 250 x 150 mm), compute/comms module (8 kg), two payload racks (10 kg each), and a regenerative friction brake (15 kg). Load cases (unchanged): (LC1) static trim at zero speed with 150 kg distributed on four lev-bogie mounts; (LC2) nominal cruise at 27.8 m/s with 1472 N distributed lev-bogie reaction and 300 N per side lateral guidance peak; (LC3) emergency brake 2 g longitudinal on 150 kg (2942 N) at brake-caliper mount; (LC4) 0.5 g cornering lateral on 150 kg (736 N) at CoM; (LC5) apply FoS 2.0 to LC3 and LC4 per EHW-style rule; (LC6) 100 kPa differential pressure applied at chassis-skin interface bolts during venting event. Pass/fail criteria (unchanged): (R1) under LC5 factored loads max von Mises <= 460 MPa yield; (R2) chassis dry mass <= 40 kg; (R3) first torsional natural frequency >= 30 Hz; (R4) peak deflection under LC3 at battery-mount rails <= 4 mm; (R5) under LC6 fastener preload loss <= 10%. In this multi-part rendering the chassis is decomposed into: (A) main chassis longitudinal beams (2 large beams running the 2.0 m length), (B) cross frames (4 cross-frame members between longitudinals at front, forward-mid, aft-mid, and rear stations), (C) bogie attachment plates (4 plates, one at each corner, interfacing to the passive magnetic bogies), (D) levitation suspension mounts (4 elastomer/leaf-spring suspension mounts between C and the chassis), (E) braking system mount (1 welded mount reacting LC3 2 g deceleration into the longitudinals), (F) payload compartment (1 bolted sub-box that houses the battery, compute/comms, and payload racks), (G) aeroshell attachment tabs (8 tabs welded to the outside of the longitudinals accepting the non-structural aeroshell). Inter-part connections: A-B welded at each node, A-C bolted at each corner, C-D bolted (suspension elements interposed), A-E welded mount bracket, A/B-F bolted (removable payload compartment), A-G welded. Final FEM verification runs on the ASSEMBLED chassis; per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Inter-part connection DCR must be <= 1.0 under governing load case (LC5 factored emergency brake). All inherited load magnitudes, material properties, and pass/fail thresholds are preserved verbatim; assembly-scope criterion R_asm1 is added. Deliverables: STEP AP242 multi-body model with each beam, frame, plate, mount, and tab as separate bodies; FEA stress under LC1-LC6; modal for R3; deflection at battery rails under LC3; bolt-preload retention under LC6; mass budget; per-connection DCR table.
short_prompt:
Deliver the primary pod chassis of a Hyperloop Geliştirme Performance-track pod as a multi-body assembly. Pod runs inside a Hyperloop test tube at 100 Pa absolute (near-vacuum), tube inner diameter 1.2 m, track 125 m. Top speed 100 km/h (27.8 m/s), minimum 2 g emergency deceleration; pod wet mass <= 150 kg.

Envelope: chassis 2.0 m (L) x 0.6 m (W) x 0.5 m (H), 150 mm tube clearance margin. Four passive magnetic bogies at corners. Payloads: battery pack 35 kg (400 x 250 x 150 mm), compute/comms 8 kg, two 10 kg payload racks, regenerative friction brake 15 kg.

Materials: AISI 4130 chromoly primary tubes (yield 460 MPa, UTS 560 MPa) and 6061-T6 aluminium plate bulkheads.

Load cases: (LC1) static trim 150 kg distributed on four lev-bogie mounts; (LC2) cruise 27.8 m/s, 1472 N distributed lev reaction + 300 N per side lateral peak; (LC3) emergency brake 2 g on 150 kg (2942 N) at brake mount; (LC4) 0.5 g cornering lateral on 150 kg (736 N) at CoM; (LC5) FoS 2.0 applied to LC3 and LC4 per EHW-style rule; (LC6) 100 kPa differential pressure at chassis-skin interface bolts during venting.

Pass/fail: (R1) LC5 factored max von Mises <= 460 MPa yield; (R2) chassis dry mass <= 40 kg; (R3) first torsional mode >= 30 Hz; (R4) deflection under LC3 at battery-mount rails <= 4 mm; (R5) under LC6 fastener preload loss <= 10%.

prompt.title: Hyperloop Pod Primary Chassis (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Welded 4130 chromoly + 6061 Al bulkhead chassis for 150 kg Hyperloop pod, 2.0 x 0.6 x 0.5 m envelope, 2 g emergency brake. Multi-part: 2 longitudinal beams, 4 cross frames, 4 bogie attachment plates, 4 lev suspension mounts, 1 brake mount, 1 payload compartment, 8 aeroshell tabs. EHW-style FoS 2.0 preserved; FEM on assembled chassis, connection DCR <= 1.0.

material.name: AISI 4130 chromoly tubes + 6061-T6 aluminum bulkhead plates

load_cases.name: cruise_27p8_mps
load_cases.application: lev-bogie vertical reaction; 300 N per side lateral guidance peak

load_cases.name: fos_2p0_factored
load_cases.application: applied to LC3 and LC4 per EHW-style rule

load_cases.name: vent_pressure
load_cases.application: differential at chassis-skin interface bolts during venting

parts.name: main_chassis_longitudinal_beam
parts.role: primary longitudinal load path running the full 2.0 m pod length, carries payload and reacts LC3 brake load

parts.name: cross_frame
parts.role: transverse frame member tying the two longitudinals at front, forward-mid, aft-mid, and rear stations
parts.count_note: 4 stations at 0, 667 mm, 1333 mm, 2000 mm typical for a 2 m pod

parts.name: bogie_attachment_plate
parts.role: welded corner plate interfacing to passive magnetic bogie; carries vertical lev reaction + cornering lateral
parts.count_note: one plate at each of the four corners

parts.name: levitation_suspension_mount
parts.role: elastomer or leaf-spring suspension element between bogie plate C and the main chassis, decouples 5-10 Hz bogie suspension from chassis torsional mode R3
parts.material_hint: elastomer block 60 Shore A or steel leaf

parts.name: brake_system_mount
parts.role: welded bracket reacting 2 g emergency brake force from regenerative friction brake into the longitudinals

parts.name: payload_compartment
parts.role: bolted removable sub-box that houses 35 kg battery, 8 kg compute, two 10 kg payload racks; reacts through A/B frame

parts.name: aeroshell_attachment_tab
parts.role: small welded tabs on outer face of longitudinals that accept the non-structural aeroshell; R5 LC6 preload retention check applies

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: 2.0 m x 0.6 m x 0.5 m within 1.2 m tube ID minus 150 mm clearance
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: x longitudinal (forward of travel +), y lateral, z vertical; origin at chassis aft lower centre

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: direct yield limit since FoS 2.0 already baked into LC5

pass_fail_criteria.description: Connection demand-to-capacity ratio (DCR) across all inter-part interfaces (IF1..IF7) <= 1.0 under governing load case (LC5 factored emergency brake).

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam (BEAM188) with rectangular tube section for A/B; shell for C/F/G; solid TET10 at welded nodes; spring + damper elements for D

interfaces.load_path: longitudinals tied to cross frames at 4 stations; transmits torsion and bending
corner bogie plate welded to longitudinals; reacts LC1/LC2 vertical and LC4 lateral
bogie plate bolted to levitation suspension mount; elastomer decouples 5-10 Hz suspension from 30 Hz chassis torsion mode
brake bracket welded to longitudinals; reacts LC3 2 g emergency brake
payload compartment bolted to longitudinals and cross frames; removable sub-box
payload compartment also bolted to two mid cross frames for pitch restraint
aeroshell tabs welded to outer face of longitudinals; LC6 preload retention (R5) governs

fem_check_policy.rationale: Bogie suspension decoupling, battery-rail deflection under brake, and chassis-skin bolt preload retention are all assembly-level observables that require the full welded+bolted model. Per-part stress is reported for visibility but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: Original brief explicitly describes a welded tubular + plate structure with four passive magnetic bogies, brake mount, and attached aeroshell; modelling as a single solid collapses the welded-node stiffness and the bolted removable payload compartment that govern R3 and R4.
notes.speculation_caveats: Longitudinal count (2), cross-frame count (4), and aeroshell-tab count (8) are typical for a 2 m hyperloop pod chassis of this class; exact counts are team-selected.
